# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent sqs policy too permissive.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  SQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600

  SNS Topic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn

  SNS Topic Policy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref SNS Topic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt SNS Topic.Arn

Outputs:
  SQSQueueUrl:
    Value: !GetAtt SQSQueue.QueueUrl
    Description: The URL of the SQS queue.
  SNSTopicArn:
    Value: !GetAtt SNS Topic.Arn
    Description: The ARN of the SNS topic.
